displayName: Kevlar Composite (Aramid fiber laminate, SAPI backer)
notes:
Kevlar (aramid) fiber composite laminate. Density 1.44 g/cm³, fiber tensile 3.6 GPa. RHAe ~0.5-0.7 per mm vs small arms — used as backing for ceramic plates (SAPI/ESAPI) or standalone fragment protection. Areal density ~7-8 kg/m² at ~5mm for NIJ IIIA handgun protection.
MIL-DTL-62474 Type II. Low spall, excellent multi-hit.

source.reference: MIL-DTL-62474 Type II, DuPont Kevlar technical data
source.methodology: RHAe from ARL ballistic test data on aramid fiber composite laminates vs small arms. Tensile strength and density per MIL-DTL-62474.
